data_description.i2c_bus: Raspberry Pi I2C bus number, usually 1.

data_description.mapping_points: Optional custom calibration as a list of points, each with 'l' (liters) and 'v' (volts). Example: [l=13 v=0.319, l=100 v=2.263]. Leave empty when using linear empty/full calibration.
data_description.empty_voltage: Alternative linear calibration: voltage at empty tank (0 L). Only use together with full voltage and leave measured points empty.
data_description.full_voltage: Alternative linear calibration: voltage at full tank (100 L). Only use together with empty voltage and leave measured points empty.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to reach the ADS1115 at this address.
error.duplicate_name: A tank with that name already exists.
error.invalid_mapping: Invalid mapping format. Expected a list of l/v entries.
error.mapping_not_enough_points: Please provide at least 2 measurement points.
error.mapping_duplicate_voltage: Voltage values must be strictly increasing.
error.mapping_conflict: Use either measured points or empty/full voltages, not both.
error.mapping_linear_requires_both: Please provide both empty and full voltage for linear calibration.
error.mapping_linear_equal_voltages: Empty and full voltage must be different.

abort.address_mismatch: The new I2C address does not match this config entry.
abort.no_tanks: No tanks are configured to edit.

tank.title: Edit {tank}
tank.description: Edit the tank channel, sensor mode, electrical settings, and calibration. Use either measured points or the empty/full voltage fields.

data_description.mapping_points: Measured calibration values as a list, e.g. [l=13 v=0.319, l=100 v=2.263]. Leave empty when using empty/full voltage.
data_description.empty_voltage: Voltage at empty tank (0 L) for a linear calibration.
data_description.full_voltage: Voltage at full tank (100 L) for a linear calibration.

error.invalid_mapping: Invalid mapping format. Expected a list of l/v entries.
error.mapping_not_enough_points: Please provide at least 2 measurement points.
error.mapping_duplicate_voltage: Voltage values must be strictly increasing.
error.mapping_conflict: Use either measured points or empty/full voltages, not both.
error.mapping_linear_requires_both: Please provide both empty and full voltage for linear calibration.
error.mapping_linear_equal_voltages: Empty and full voltage must be different.
